pre_check_flags.detail: Diff size looks larger than expected: changed_lines=5893, expected≈10, ratio=589.30, files=76, hunks=180.

criteria.name: A new `src/shared/state/realtimeStore.ts` exists with effective-project task storage, full-record single-task upsert, batch pending-task bootstrap upsert, scoped reset actions, and selector helpers for single-task and pending-generation task views.
criteria.evidence: Confirmed in `src/shared/state/realtimeStore.ts`: store state is scoped by effective project key, stores canonical `Task` objects, exposes `upsertTask`/`upsertTasks`/`resetScope`, plus `useRealtimeTask` and `useRealtimePendingGenerationTasks`. Tests in `src/shared/state/realtimeStore.test.ts` cover single upsert, batch upsert, and scoped reset.

criteria.name: Cold-start hydration is explicitly implemented through centralized query or repository helpers so current-project task details and pending-generation badges are correct before the first new realtime event.
criteria.evidence: `src/shared/hooks/tasks/useTasks.ts` seeds canonical task snapshots from cached/fetched single-task query results via `getCachedTaskSnapshot`, `fetchAndSeedTaskQuery`, and `seedTaskSnapshot`. `src/shared/hooks/tasks/usePendingGenerationTasks.ts` bootstraps queued/in-progress tasks through the existing query path and seeds them with `seedRealtimeTasksFromRows(...)` before reading the narrow selector.

criteria.name: Raw realtime task hydration is explicitly bound to the canonical validator/mapper in `src/shared/lib/taskRowMapper.ts`, so store writes use `isTaskDbRow(...)` and `mapTaskDbRowToTask(...)` or an explicitly aligned `TaskDbRow`-compatible type, not an ad hoc `TaskRecord` mapper.
criteria.evidence: `src/shared/providers/RealtimeProvider.tsx` validates `event.new` with `isTaskDbRow(...)` and maps with `mapTaskDbRowToTask(...)` before store writes. `src/shared/state/realtimeStore.ts` raw-row helpers `seedRealtimeTaskFromRow` and `seedRealtimeTasksFromRows` use the same canonical validator/mapper path. No realtime-specific mapper was introduced.

criteria.name: `RealtimeProvider` writes task realtime updates into the store from raw `RealtimeConnection` rows, not from reduced `RealtimeEventProcessor` payloads, while preserving the existing selected-project Supabase connection lifecycle and the public status-only `useRealtime` API.
criteria.evidence: In `src/shared/providers/RealtimeProvider.tsx`, `realtimeConnection.onEvent(...)` calls `hydrateTaskSnapshot(event)` on raw `RawDatabaseEvent` rows and separately forwards the event to `realtimeEventProcessor.process(event)`. The provider still owns selected-project connect/disconnect behavior and still exposes the same `RealtimeContext`/`useRealtime` status API. `src/shared/providers/__tests__/RealtimeProvider.test.tsx` covers canonical row hydration and lifecycle reset.

criteria.name: Incomplete or invalid raw realtime task rows trigger a targeted fetch or React Query prefetch fallback before store seeding, rather than creating partial task snapshots in `realtimeStore`.
criteria.evidence: `RealtimeProvider.hydrateTaskSnapshot` falls back to `getCachedTaskSnapshot(...)` or `fetchAndSeedTaskQuery(...)` when `event.new` fails `isTaskDbRow(...)`; it never writes partial fragments. Provider tests explicitly cover incomplete-row fetch fallback in `src/shared/providers/__tests__/RealtimeProvider.test.tsx`.

criteria.name: `useGetTask` preserves the empty-id disabled contract and `resolveTaskProjectScope()` fallback behavior while reading from the store when available and staying React-Query-authoritative for fetch lifecycle.
criteria.evidence: `src/shared/hooks/tasks/useTasks.ts` still resolves `effectiveProjectId` with `resolveTaskProjectScope(projectId)`, uses `enabled: !!taskId && !!effectiveProjectId` in `createSingleTaskQueryOptions`, reads `storeTask` through `useRealtimeTask`, and returns `data: storeTask ?? query.data`. Tests in `src/shared/hooks/tasks/__tests__/useTasks.test.ts` cover empty-id disabling and selected-project fallback behavior.

criteria.name: Every live single-task cache writer or reader that uses `taskQueryKeys.single(...)` is either integrated into canonical store seeding or explicitly deferred with rationale and test impact, including `useTaskPrefetch`, `generationTaskCache`, `GenerationTaskContext`, and `useVariantSourceTask`.
criteria.evidence: `src/shared/hooks/tasks/useTaskPrefetch.ts` now routes both prefetch hooks through `getCachedTaskSnapshot` and `fetchAndSeedTaskQuery`. `src/domains/generation/hooks/tasks/generationTaskCache.ts` uses `fetchAndSeedTaskQuery` and `getCachedTaskSnapshot`. `src/domains/media-lightbox/hooks/taskDetails/useVariantSourceTask.ts` now delegates to `useGetTask`. Grep confirms only `src/shared/hooks/tasks/useTasks.ts` still references `taskQueryKeys.single(...)` in application code. `GenerationTaskContext.tsx` remains a thin facade over the migrated generation-task cache helpers.

criteria.name: `usePendingGenerationTasks` preserves current cold-start semantics by bootstrapping the full current-project queued or in-progress task set before deriving generation-specific results from narrow store selectors.
criteria.evidence: `src/shared/hooks/tasks/usePendingGenerationTasks.ts` first queries current-project queued/in-progress tasks, seeds them through `seedRealtimeTasksFromRows`, then returns `pendingCount` and `pendingTasks` from `useRealtimePendingGenerationTasks(...)`. `src/shared/hooks/__tests__/usePendingGenerationTasks.test.ts` covers bootstrap seeding and selector-driven derivation.

criteria.name: `usePendingGenerationTasks`, `useGenerationTaskDetails`, and other visible current-project single-task surfaces read from narrow store selectors or the adapted single-task path instead of relying on unrelated invalidation churn for updates.
criteria.evidence: `useGenerationTaskDetails` still calls `useGetTask(taskId || '', projectId)` in `src/shared/components/TaskDetails/hooks/useGenerationTaskDetails.ts`; visible gallery and variant readers continue to call `useGetTask(...)`, which is now store-backed internally. `useVariantSourceTask` was migrated to `useGetTask`. Store tests prove task-A updates do not rerender task-B selectors.

criteria.name: `useTaskStatusCounts` preserves current derivation semantics, including root-task exclusion, visible task-type filtering, processing-status rules, and recent success or failure windows.
criteria.evidence: `src/shared/hooks/tasks/useTaskStatusCounts.ts` remains query-authoritative and still uses `applyRootTaskFilter(...)`, `getVisibleTaskTypes()`, `TASK_PROCESSING_STATUSES`, `TASK_FAILURE_STATUSES`, `generation_processed_at`, and `updated_at` windows unchanged. Related tests remain in `src/shared/hooks/tasks/__tests__/useTaskStatusCounts.test.ts`.

criteria.name: `useTaskStatusCounts({ allProjectIds })` remains correct by keeping a query-authoritative freshness path rather than relying on selected-project realtime store updates for non-selected projects.
criteria.evidence: The all-project path was not moved into the realtime store. `src/shared/hooks/tasks/useTaskStatusCounts.ts` still fetches counts directly from Supabase in all-project mode. The known `__all-projects__` cache-key aliasing debt remains unchanged and was not claimed fixed, but M3 did not regress freshness by coupling counts to the selected-project store.

criteria.name: Current-project `useTaskStatusCounts(projectId)` also remains query-authoritative in M3 unless a full-project bootstrap is added, so existing callers do not regress to partial counts.
criteria.evidence: `useTaskStatusCounts` was left entirely query-authoritative; no store-backed aggregate selector was introduced in `realtimeStore.ts`. This matches settled decision D3 and avoids partial current-project counts.

criteria.name: Selectors that return objects or arrays provide stable references for semantically unchanged results, using `shallow` or equivalent equality control, and tests cover that behavior.
criteria.evidence: `src/shared/state/realtimeStore.ts` uses `useStoreWithEqualityFn(..., shallow)` for the pending-generation selector and preserves previous objects/arrays when semantically unchanged via `deepEqual`, `areStringArraysEqual`, and `buildPendingTaskSummaries`. `src/shared/state/realtimeStore.test.ts` verifies unrelated updates do not rerender pending selectors and keep the same array reference.

criteria.name: Store, provider, hook, and facade tests cover task upsert, batch pending bootstrap, scoped reset, selector narrowing for unrelated task updates, empty-id disabled behavior, `resolveTaskProjectScope()` fallback behavior, canonical raw-event hydration with fetch fallback, and coherent store seeding from prefetch, preload, and generation-task facade helpers.
criteria.evidence: Coverage is present across `src/shared/state/realtimeStore.test.ts`, `src/shared/providers/__tests__/RealtimeProvider.test.tsx`, `src/shared/hooks/tasks/__tests__/useTasks.test.ts`, `src/shared/hooks/tasks/__tests__/useTaskPrefetch.test.ts`, `src/shared/hooks/__tests__/usePendingGenerationTasks.test.ts`, `src/shared/lib/__tests__/generationTaskCache.test.ts`, and `src/domains/media-lightbox/hooks/taskDetails/useVariantSourceTask.test.ts`. Existing `src/shared/contexts/__tests__/GenerationTaskContext.test.tsx` still covers the facade mounting path, while the seeding behavior it delegates to is exercised at the generation-task cache layer.

criteria.name: `npx tsc --noEmit` completes successfully.
criteria.evidence: Verified directly during review: `npx tsc --noEmit` exited successfully in `/workspace/reigh-app`. Executor evidence also recorded clean typecheck runs after the store/provider/hook migrations.

criteria.name: `npm test` completes at baseline.
criteria.evidence: Executor evidence recorded a green full suite (`npm test` passed with 886 files / 4573 tests). Review-side spot verification also showed the suite running with the changed M3 tests green, including `RealtimeProvider`, `useTasks`, `useTaskPrefetch`, `usePendingGenerationTasks`, `useTaskStatusCounts`, and `generationTaskCache`.

criteria.name: Existing public hook and facade signatures remain stable enough that gallery items, variant details, Tasks Pane, lightbox, task details, and generation-task consumers require little or no API churn.
criteria.evidence: The main public APIs remain intact: `useGetTask(taskId, projectId)`, `usePendingGenerationTasks(generationId, projectId)`, `useGenerationTaskDetails(...)`, `usePrefetchTaskData()`, and `usePrefetchTaskById()` kept their caller-facing signatures. Visible surfaces continue to call the same hooks, with the migration happening behind those interfaces.

criteria.name: `useActiveTaskClips` is explicitly classified as deferred or migrated with rationale so the milestone scope remains intentional.
criteria.evidence: The audit document added in `.megaplan/plans/m3-realtime-events-store-20260417-0218/t1-task-state-audit.md` explicitly defers `src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useActiveTaskClips.ts` with rationale that it broadens scope into timeline/editor semantics rather than the gallery single-task rerender problem.

criteria.name: Gallery items no longer rerender on unrelated task events in a 50+ item runtime smoke test.
criteria.evidence: Requires a browser-driven runtime check. Executor correctly skipped this on first encounter because no browser-driving path is available in the container.

criteria.name: A per-task status surface, if present after migration, rerenders only for the matching task when observed with runtime telemetry.
criteria.evidence: Requires runtime telemetry/browser observation unavailable to the container. Automated selector-narrowing tests exist, but the telemetry criterion itself remains deferred to human verification.

summary: Approved. All must criteria pass against the final diff and the settled decisions were implemented correctly: `RealtimeProvider` remains the selected-project boundary, raw task hydration reuses the canonical task-row mapper, `useTaskStatusCounts` stays query-authoritative, and live `taskQueryKeys.single(...)` readers/writers were routed through the shared seeding path. Runtime rerender smoke checks remain deferred human work, and the pre-existing `allProjectIds` status-count cache-key aliasing debt remains unchanged but out of scope for M3.

task_verdicts.reviewer_verdict: Pass. The audit file exists and explicitly classifies in-scope, query-authoritative, and deferred paths, including `usePrefetchTaskById()` and `useActiveTaskClips`.
Pass. `realtimeStore.ts` implements the scoped Zustand store, canonical raw-row seeding helpers, and stable selector behavior proven by targeted tests.
Pass. `RealtimeProvider` now hydrates from raw task rows through the canonical mapper, preserves the status API, and falls back to targeted fetches for incomplete rows.
Pass. The single-task read/write surface was unified through `useTasks` helpers across `useGetTask`, prefetch, generation cache, and variant-source reading.
Pass. `usePendingGenerationTasks` now bootstraps pending tasks into the store, while `useTaskStatusCounts` intentionally remains query-authoritative and unchanged in semantics.
Pass. Verification evidence matches the repo state: targeted tests cover selector narrowing and seeding paths, `npx tsc --noEmit` passes, and executor evidence shows a green full `npm test` run.

sense_check_verdicts.verdict: Confirmed. The added audit file explicitly inventories the live task-state surface, includes the hover prefetch path, and locks the canonical mapper plus invalid-row fallback rules before implementation.
Confirmed. The store is keyed by effective project scope and `taskId`, only exposes the M3 selectors/actions, and the tests prove stable pending selector references and unrelated-selector narrowing.

Confirmed. `RealtimeProvider` seeds the store from raw realtime rows via the canonical validator/mapper, preserves the selected-project lifecycle and `useRealtime` API, and fetches on incomplete rows instead of writing partial snapshots.

Confirmed. `useGetTask`, prefetch helpers, generation-task cache helpers, `useVariantSourceTask`, and provider fallback fetches now share the same canonical single-task query/store seeding path while preserving existing hook contracts.

Confirmed. `usePendingGenerationTasks` cold-starts from the current-project pending query and then reads narrow selectors, while `useTaskStatusCounts` remains query-authoritative with unchanged semantics.

Confirmed. The repository contains the claimed automated coverage, grep evidence aligns with the migrated surface, `npx tsc --noEmit` passes, and executor evidence supports the green full test run; browser-only rerender checks were correctly deferred.
